rules.rule_text:
title: PowerShell Deleted Mounted Share
id: 66a4d409-451b-4151-94f4-a55d559c49b0
status: test
description: Detects when when a mounted share is removed. Adversaries may remove
  share connections that are no longer useful in order to clean up traces of their
  operation
references:
- https://github.com/redcanaryco/atomic-red-team/blob/f339e7da7d05f6057fdfcdd3742bfcf365fee2a9/atomics/T1070.005/T1070.005.md
author: oscd.community, @redcanary, Zach Stanford @svch0st
date: 2020-10-08
modified: 2025-10-07
tags:
- attack.defense-evasion
- attack.t1070.005
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: ps_script
  definition: 'Requirements: Script Block Logging must be enabled'
detection:
  selection:
    ScriptBlockText|contains:
    - Remove-SmbShare
    - Remove-FileShare
  filter_main_module_load:
    ScriptBlockText|contains|all:
    - FileShare.cdxml
    - Microsoft.PowerShell.Core\Export-ModuleMember
    - ROOT/Microsoft/Windows/Storage/MSFT_FileShare
    - ObjectModelWrapper
    - Cmdletization.MethodParameter
  condition: selection and not 1 of filter_main_*
falsepositives:
- Administrators or Power users may remove their shares via cmd line
level: medium
